data.title: User Data Encryption
data.description: Sensitive user data is encrypted both in transit and at rest to protect against unauthorized access.
data.technical_spec: AES-256 encryption for data at rest, TLS 1.2+ for data in transit.

data.title: Secure Authentication
data.description: Spotify implements robust authentication mechanisms to ensure user account safety.

data.title: DDoS Protection
data.description: Employs strategies to detect and mitigate Distributed Denial-of-Service attacks.
data.technical_spec: AWS Shield for proactive DDoS defense.

data.title: Vulnerability Management
data.description: Regular security audits and a bug bounty program to identify vulnerabilities.
data.technical_spec: Automated scanning and manual security testing.

data.title: Application Security
data.description: Secure coding practices are enforced to prevent common web vulnerabilities such as XSS, CSRF, and SQL injection.
data.technical_spec: Integration of security tools in CI/CD pipelines.
